headerTitle: Senior Software Engineer  ·  Real Estate Data & Analytics  ·  Full-Stack TypeScript  ·  Remote
intro: LightBox is the data and analytics layer for commercial real estate — pulling appraisal district data, property records, and market signals into tools that real estate professionals depend on. County appraisal district API integration, property data pipelines, and full-stack engineering are production-proven.
bullets: Real estate data integration, in production — built and deployed county appraisal district API pipelines (TCAD and multi-county CAD endpoints), property-level data normalization, bbox-based geographic queries, and large-scale owner name extraction under real operational load.

TypeScript + Next.js 15 + PostgreSQL full-stack — 13 production platforms, 100+ API routes, Prisma ORM, BullMQ + Redis, Docker, PM2, Nginx. Multi-tenant architecture patterns. Remote-deployed on Linux VPS with CI/CD pipelines. Ship velocity is established.

Data pipeline and integration depth — webhook processing, scheduled reporting, Stripe billing, IMAP email sync (90-day), external API integration across multiple undocumented schemas. The messy real-world data problem is a daily working condition, not a new challenge.
matchNotes: Good match on real estate data domain (TCAD pipelines), TypeScript/Next.js stack, data integration. LightBox is CRE data analytics. $150-165K is fair. Standard senior SWE hire, not FDE. Remote. Real estate data experience is a genuine differentiator here.
